sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107024" key="u(pe/gkeimai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέγκειμαι</orth>, <sense id="n107024.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form an inner layer,</tr_> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπέρκ-</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
